reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use GitHub tools to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents.
Found and clicked "QA-20260416-182626-l701" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, status shows "idle".
Verified agent status is "idle" — Confirmed, status indicator shows "idle".
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted successfully, agent status changed to "working".
Account access request card appeared — Card displayed asking to "Allow access to GitHub to retrieve your username?" with GitHub account pre-selected.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Agent continued processing, status changed to "awaiting input" then back to "working".
API Request Review card appeared — Showing "Allow get the authenticated user?" for GitHub GET /user endpoint.
Clicked "Allow Once" to permit the API call — Permission granted, agent continued processing.
Waited for agent to complete response — Agent completed after approximately 43 seconds of total processing time.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190." confirming successful retrieval of the authenticated user's GitHub username.
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation flow and final response with GitHub username.
